contextBlurb: Alaska has 12 bills tracked in 2025–2026. 2 are already enacted.

legislation.title: Data Centers, Utilities
legislation.summary: An Act relating to data centers; and relating to utility service for data centers.

legislation.title: Ai, Deepfakes, Cybersecurity, Data Xfers
legislation.summary: An Act relating to disclosure of election-related deepfakes; relating to use of artificial intelligence by state agencies; and relating to transfer of data about individuals between state agencies.

legislation.title: State Apprenticeshp Office; Council
legislation.summary: An Act relating to apprenticeship programs; establishing a state apprenticeship office; and establishing the Alaska Apprenticeship Advisory Council.

legislation.title: Schools: Comm. Devices/class Size/funding
legislation.summary: An Act relating to maximum classroom sizes in public schools; relating to education reports; relating to charter schools; relating to student transportation funding; relating to secondary school vocational and technical instruction funding; relating to the base student allocat...

legislation.title: Synthetic Media: Liability; Elections
legislation.summary: An Act relating to defamation claims based on the use of synthetic media; relating to the use of synthetic media in electioneering communications; and providing for an effective date.

legislation.title: Home Care Employment Standards Adv Board
legislation.summary: An Act establishing the Home Care Employment Standards Advisory Board; relating to payment for personal care services; and providing for an effective date.

legislation.title: Health Insurance Allowable Charges
legislation.summary: An Act relating to settlement of health insurance claims; relating to allowable charges for health care services or supplies; and providing for an effective date.

legislation.title: Rename Pfd Resource Dividend
legislation.summary: An Act relating to dividends for state residents; relating to the dividend fund; and providing for an effective date.

legislation.title: Home Care Employment Standards Adv Board
legislation.summary: An Act establishing the Home Care Employment Standards Advisory Board; relating to payment for personal care services; and providing for an effective date.

legislation.title: Career And Technical Education Grants
legislation.summary: An Act establishing the career and technical education mobility grant program; relating to pre-apprenticeship and work-based learning opportunities for secondary school students; and providing for an effective date.
